errors.message: Streamable HTTP error: Error POSTing to endpoint: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","error":{"code":-32001,"message":"Authentication required. This connector uses OAuth — your MCP host (Claude Desktop, claude.ai, ChatGPT desktop, mcp-inspector) should follow the WWW-Authenticate header to discover the auth flow.
